items.claim: Stage 7r.1 completed 8/8 targeted smoke runs and passed 8/8 under low-cost-model G8/G9.
Stage 7r.1 supports the mechanism-first repair hypothesis for A2R/A7R low-cost-model failures.
A8R has mixed execution evidence because low-cost G8 timed out while low-cost G9 and strong G8/G9 passed.
Stage 7r.2 admits a narrow evidence-bound decision macro and blocks full project initialization and full research workflow composition.
No supplied evidence supports production readiness or universal model-gap closure.
Run Stage 7e v4 local golden/bad checks and then a targeted low-cost-model smoke before broader macro expansion.
Stage 7e v2 repaired trace and stage-gate retention in 4/4 low-cost-model runs.
Stage 7e v3 repaired Git/CI/network unknown-state retention in 4/4 low-cost-model runs and passed full strict macro evaluation in 3/4 runs.
Stage 7e v3 still had one G8 run fail because it compressed known-state provenance into generic labels rather than preserving explicit Stage 7r.1/Stage 7r.2 evidence-linked state.
A neighboring team reported that a separate workflow passed an internal demonstration.
